title: B2B Reviews Scraper Input
description: Scrape reviews from G2, Capterra, and Trustpilot.

companies.title: Companies
companies.description: Company or product names to search for (e.g. 'Asana', 'monday.com').

maxReviewsPerPlatform.title: Max reviews per platform
maxReviewsPerPlatform.description: Maximum number of reviews to collect per company per platform.

sortBy.title: Sort reviews by
sortBy.description: Order in which to collect reviews.

minRating.title: Minimum rating
minRating.description: Only collect reviews at or above this star rating (1–5). Leave blank for all.
